summary: Dashboard redesign testing completed. All 5 new dashboard components (TotalViewPerformance, TransactionList, RevenueChart, SalesReport, PromotionalCard) are rendering correctly with proper data, styling, and layout matching the reference design.

minor.issue: Returns 400 Bad Request (pre-existing issue from iteration_2)
Function not found error in console (pre-existing issue)

issues: Some icons appear as empty boxes (pre-existing font loading issue from previous iterations)

transaction_list.details: All 7 sample transactions displayed with correct icons, dates (Jul 12th 2024), order IDs (OJWEJS7ISNC), and statuses (Completed/Pending)

revenue_chart.details: Shows $193,000.00 with +35% trend indicator and bar chart visualization with Income/Expenses legend

total_view_performance.details: Shows 565K total count with donut chart displaying correct percentages (16%, 23%, 68%) and legend (View Count, Percentage, Sales)

sales_report.details: Shows horizontal bars for Product Launched (233), Ongoing Product (23), Product Sold (482)

promotional_card.details: Displays 'Level up your sales managing to the next level.' text with 'Update to Siohioma+' button

update_card.details: Shows 'Sales revenue increased 40% in 1 week' with 'See Statistics' button and mini bar chart

dashboard_layout.details: 3-column layout: Left (Transaction), Middle (Revenue + Sales Report), Right (Total View + Promotional Card)

critical_code_review_comments: data-testid props on React Native View components may not translate to HTML data-testid attributes on web. Consider using testID prop instead which React Native Web translates correctly
Pre-existing: Console warning about deprecated 'shadow*' and 'textShadow*' style props - should use 'boxShadow' and 'textShadow' instead
Pre-existing: Icon font loading issue causes some sidebar icons to appear as empty boxes
seed_data_creation: TransactionList uses default sample data when no recent_orders from API
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard redesign is complete. All 5 new components are working correctly. The WebDashboard component (lines 931-1135 in dashboard.tsx) renders the new 3-column layout with TransactionList, RevenueChart, SalesReport, TotalViewPerformance, and PromotionalCard. The components use sample/default data when no real data exists. The design matches the reference image with Update card at top, stat cards row, then the 3-column grid layout.
